use_cases: Scheduling meetings with clients or team members
Booking appointments for consultations or services
Setting up product demos or sales calls
Organizing calendar events and time slots
Arranging video calls with integrated time picker
ai_summary: A Meeting Scheduler component featuring a clean, functional interface for selecting dates and times to book meetings. Built with shadcn/ui Button primitives and Radix UI Slot for composability. Designed for professional scheduling workflows with a minimalist aesthetic that works across desktop and mobile platforms.
